commit_scope: The BMF discipline encoded and its cursor lane laid: BMF matches bytes straight off a streaming cursor (no lexer, no token stream), backtracking restores a cursor position and stack coordinate (pointer moves), and recipe args ride the call stack — bmf-architecture.form's record, now honored in the fourth sibling via op 17 BUF (source-stream byte at index) with the cursor position living in the RAM organ. A real backtracking matcher witnessed; bmf-mini honestly marked as the fold proof only, not the parse shape.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-os-band.fk
local_validation.summary: fourth-os-band re-proven three-way at 15 with the grown emissions re-pinned (universal 3124 bytes, jit 3039 — the lengths couple cross-kernel text agreement to the verdict). The audit's streaming-BMF section ran a real backtracking match on real byte streams through ONE matcher table: source x42 -> rule A matches x off the cursor, streams digits -> 42; source 9001 -> rule A FAILS on the first byte -> the cursor is RESTORED through the RAM organ (SET/GET — a pointer move, never a copy) -> rule B streams the digits -> 9001. No tokenizer anywhere: op 17 BUF reads the loaded source byte at an index; advance is SET 0 (GET 0 + 1); save/restore are mem slots; recipe args ride the C call stack via CALL parameters.

observed_delta.backtrack: rule A failed on byte one; cursor restored via RAM organ; rule B succeeded
observed_delta.discipline: streaming cursor, no lexer/token stream; stack args; save/restore = pointer moves

known_limitations.limitation: fail-as-0 collides with a legitimately matched 0 — BMF's richer ack vocabulary {nothing, 0, 1, node} is the named fix once the walker grows a first-class nothing.
known_limitations.follow_up: Axiom-1's nothing lands as a walker value; fail becomes nothing and 0 becomes honest data.

known_limitations.limitation: The matcher is combinator-authored; the full engine.fk rule set (Alt/Seq/Run/Many with memoized Match) arrives via m4e3's observe-door flattener.
known_limitations.follow_up: The cursor lane is the substrate engine.fk's rules need; m4e3 reads them as cells and runs them here.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run the fourth-kernel bands three-way.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib additions ride the api image rebuild; the lattice ingests the updated fourth-kernel.form on the post-merge hook.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route behavior changes. The fourth sibling gains BMF's true parse substrate: a streaming cursor over loaded source with pointer-move backtracking and stack-resident args — the discipline encoded in the spec, the lane witnessed with a real choice/fail/restore match.
test_flows: fourth-os-band pins the grown emissions exactly (3124/3039) and the organ/cursor tissue three-way at 15.
fourth_kernel_audit.sh section 11: one matcher table over two real byte streams — match, fail, restore, re-match — values 42 and 9001.
e2e_validation.summary: validate.sh three-way 1 ok 0 divergent; audit end-to-end streaming match with backtrack.

phase_gate.gate: streaming-cursor match with pointer-move backtrack witnessed; CI three-way + deploy ingest confirm the crossing
phase_gate.next: first-class nothing (the honest fail ack); m4e3 — engine.fk's Alt/Seq/Run rules through the observe door onto this cursor
